zh.Billinge, Merseyside, Lancashire, Englan: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾比林

zh.Christ Church, District of Dean, Bolton,: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾博爾頓克里斯蒂 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isolda Billinge於1341年出生在英國藍卡爾比林時，她的父親Adam de Billinge24歲，母親Agnes Heiton20歲。她於1358年與Richard de Heiton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾比林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她於1385年在英國藍卡爾薩爾福德被列為keeper of the peace。她去世於1386年在英國藍卡爾希頓享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾博爾頓克里斯蒂 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isolda Billinge于1341年出生在英国藍卡爾比林时，她的父亲Adam de Billinge24岁，母亲Agnes Heiton20岁。她于1358年与Richard de Heiton在英国英格兰藍卡爾比林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她于1385年在英国藍卡爾薩爾福德被列为keeper of the peace。她去世于1386年在英国藍卡爾希頓享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾博爾頓克里斯蒂 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Billinge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Isolda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The name of the tragic mistress of Tristan in the Arthurian romances. There are several versions of the story. The main features are that the beautiful Isolde, an Irish princess, is betrothed to the aged King Mark of Cornwall. However, through accidentally drinking a magic potion, she and the young Cornish knight Tristan fall in love, with tragic consequences. The story has exercised a powerful hold on the European imagination. The name was relatively common in Britain in the Middle Ages, but is much rarer today.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isolda Billinge was born in 1341, in Billinge, Lancashire, England, her father, Adam de Billinge, was 24 and her mother, Agnes Heiton, was 20. She married Richard de Heiton in 1358, in Billinge, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1385, at the age of 44, her occupation is listed as keeper of the peace in Salford, Lancashire, England. She died in 1386, in Heaton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Christ Church, Bolton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isolda Billinge est née en 1341, à Billinge, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Billinge, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Agnes Heiton, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Heiton en 1358, à Billinge, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1385, à l’âge de 44 ans, la profession de sa indiquée est keeper of the peace à Salford, Lancashire, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1386, à Heaton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Christ Church, Bolton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isolda Billinge 1341 in Billinge, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam de Billinge 24 und ihre Mutter Agnes Heiton 20. Sie hat 1358 in Billinge, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Richard de Heiton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1385, als sie 44 Jahre alt war, war ihr Beruf als keeper of the peace in Salford, Lancashire, England aufgeführt. Sie starb 1386 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Heaton, Lancashire, England und wurde in Christ Church, Bolton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isolda Billinge è nata il nel 1341 nel Billinge, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Adam de Billinge, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Agnes Heiton, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Heiton nel 1358, nel Billinge, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1385, all'età di 44 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come keeper of the peace nel Salford, Lancashire, England. Morì nel 1386, nel Heaton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Christ Church, Bolton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isolda Billingeが1341年にイギリスランカシュアイアビリンッジで生まれた時，父Adam de Billingeは24歳，母Agnes Heitonは20歳であった。1358年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアビリンッジでRichard de Heitonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1385年，44歳の時，イギリスランカシュアイアサルフォードでの職業はkeeper of the peaceと記録されている。彼女は1386年にイギリスランカシュアイアヒートンで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアボルトンチリスト チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Christ Church, District of Dean, Bolton,: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 볼턴 크리스트 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Isolda Billinge(이)가 1341년 영국 랭카실르 빌링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam de Billinge(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Heiton(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 빌링에서 Richard de Heiton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1385년, 44세의 나이로 그녀의 직업은 영국 랭카실르 살퍼드에서 keeper of the peace이었다. 그녀는 1386년 영국 랭카실르 히턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 볼턴 크리스트 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isolda Billinge nasceu em 1341, em Billinge, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Billinge, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Heiton, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Heiton em 1358, em Billinge, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1385, com 44 anos, sua profissão aparece como keeper of the peace em Salford, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 1386, em Heaton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Christ Church, Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Christ Church, District of Dean, Bolton,: краист чурч, болтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isolda Billinge родилась в 1341 г. в местности биллинг, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam de Billinge было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Heiton, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Heiton в 1358 г. в местности биллинг, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1385 году, в возрасте 44 лет,  она работала по профессии keeper of the peace в местности салфорд, ланкашир, Англия. Она умерла в 1386 г. в местности хитон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности краист чурч, болтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Richard de Heiton en 1358, en Billinge, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1385, a la edad de 44 años, su ocupación registrada era keeper of the peace en Salford, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1386, en Heaton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Christ Church, Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
